message:
fix(analysis): correct TopKSet self-counting bug and add --robot-full-stats guard

The TopKSet greedy algorithm was incorrectly counting the selected issue
itself as an "unlocked" downstream item, inflating cumulative_unlocks.
Also adds CLI validation that --robot-full-stats requires --robot-insights,
with a corresponding integration test. Refreshes date-sensitive TUI snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
